name: Parkour Assassin: Sprint Run
short_description: A 3D parkour game in a cyberpunk style, where you can experience breathtaking speeds, dodge various traps, and continuously break through to achieve the furthest distance. Terrifying bombs and robotic enemies will stand in your way, but you can use the quick blade in your hand to slash through them!
detailed_description:
Follow Us


About the Game

This is an exhilarating and challenging parkour game where players take on the role of an agile character, darting and leaping through the skyscrapers in a cyberpunk setting, experiencing the thrill of extreme sports. Antagonists have placed robotic assassins and numerous traps throughout the map to hinder your progress; only the most nimble assassins can run further!

【Roam in the Cyberpunk Night Scene】

The game is set against the backdrop of a bustling cityscape at night, with towering skyscrapers and flickering neon lights, providing a visually striking environment for your parkour adventures.

【The Allure of Parkour Won't Let You Stop】

You can sprint across rooftops, scale neon-lit walls, and even use grappling hooks to swing between buildings. The game's fast pace is filled with thrilling elements, requiring players to make swift decisions and execute a variety of challenging maneuvers within a limited time frame.

【The Samurai Sword is Your Best Weapon】

Dodge missiles that come flying at you, leap over boards studded with nails and rotating traps, and use the samurai sword in your hand to slice through every robotic enemy and bomb.

【Upgrade Your Talents, Unlock New Weapons, and Run Further】

You can enhance your physique by upgrading your talents, unlock new weapons to increase your combat power, and cover greater distances! Perfect agility can earn you higher scores and the attention of everyone!
